meaning: adv.柔软地,四肢无力地,无生气的
examples: Her hair hung limply over her forehead.
Flags and bunting hung limply in the still, warm air.
I knock limply on the door and open it.
Younus Khan hit 46 not out of 31 balls, but his team finished limply on 137-7.
And it punctiliously obeys, its gas pedal falling limply ineffective as you approach the limit.
